riskAdjusted.label: Balanced
riskAdjusted.description: Balanced baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.75% per-bet cap, and a 2.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll. Long-shot underdogs above +300 are skipped.

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Aggressive baseline with the shared value screen, a 1% per-bet cap, and a 3% nightly budget on the reference bankroll. Long-shot underdogs above +300 are skipped.

capitalPreservation.label: Conservative
capitalPreservation.description: Conservative baseline with the shared value screen, a 0.75% per-bet cap, and a 2.50% nightly budget on the reference bankroll.
